tasks.title: Daily forecast-simulate-collapse sync
tasks.prompt: Run the daily sync: (1) ingest treasury snapshot and department KPIs from the ledger; (2) forecast each active path's 7-day revenue contribution; (3) simulate collapse — what breaks if the top path goes to zero; (4) reprioritize departments; (5) emit tomorrow's dispatch order with per-department targets tied to treasury inflow.

tasks.title: Treasury metrics heartbeat
tasks.prompt: Snapshot treasury balances (SINC, AXM, USDC on Base) and adapter positions. Compare to previous snapshot. Alert if any balance moves beyond threshold or if inflow stalls 48h.
